title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXC. Lullabies.
content:
Danty baby diddy,
        What can a mammy do wid'e,
            But sit in a lap,
            And give 'un a pap?
        Sing danty baby diddy.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXC. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
